Design Review moved to Thursday
Hey team, quick heads-up — we're pushing the design review to Thursday at 2pm.
James Patel
Feedback on your client presentation
Great work on the slides. I added a couple of notes around clarity and flow.
Laura Chen
Coffee next week?
It's been a while since we caught up — are you free for a quick coffee next week?
HR Team
Reminder: Open enrollment closes Friday
Don't forget to update your benefits selections before the deadline this week.
Mike Torres
Sprint planning agenda attached
Please review the agenda ahead of Monday’s sprint planning meeting.

Team workspace
Share
Streamlining Team Documentation
I've been thinking about how our team can streamline the onboarding process for
new-hires
.
Right now, documentation is scattered across different tools, which makes it hard to find answers quickly. If we consolidate into a single hub and add
more real-world examples, I think it'll cut down on
repetative
questions and help people ramp up faster.

Mail
The most productive email app ever made
Fly through your inbox twice as fast as before, never drop the ball again, and save 4 hours every single week.

Follow up on time, every time
Write with AI that sounds like you

Everyone’s favorite AI writing partner
Turn your thoughts into writing that’s clear, credible, and impossible to ignore.
Learn more about Grammarly
Works everywhere you write
Find the right words instantly
Write with AI that adapts to your tone and voice
Let your brilliance shine

Coda
The all-in-one AI workspace for teams
Build everything from wikis, through project plans, to goal trackers — keeping everyone perfectly in sync.
Learn more about Coda
Connect Slack, Jira, Salesforce, and 800+ tools
Build your team wiki, project plans, and company goal trackers
Create a single source of truth for all your team’s knowledge
Save time on manual tasks with Coda AI
Sorry, your browser doesn't support embedded videos.
Go
AI that actually works in every app you use
Go is the proactive AI assistant that knows what you know and offers help without you having to ask.
Learn more about Go
Connect Gmail, Drive, Jira, and all of your favorite apps
Say the right thing with the right info, everywhere you write
Schedule meetings without leaving the conversation
Work with any app, from any app
Sorry, your browser doesn't support embedded videos.
Becoming Superhuman.
When AI works everywhere you work, it starts to change
how
you work. At first, you think faster and more deeply. Before you know it, you have the time to be more creative, strategic, and impactful—free to do what only you can do.
Read our announcement

It's the speed, thoughtfulness, and quality that for me, make it a no-brainer for any high-performing team.
Jen Igartua
CEO, Go Nimbly
My co-founder and I run a startup studio, and constant communication is incredibly important. Superhuman Mail is one of the first tools that immediately changed my habits: increasing my responsiveness, while decreasing the time I spend on email.

Managing Partner, Chapter One
Superhuman Mail brings order back to email and makes it useful again. My team doesn't miss emails anymore, and they're actually able to focus on the things that matter.
Ben Terrill
Sr. Director of Customer Success, Brex

Are you lost?
We'll help find your way —
get started with Superhuman Mail
, or browse our latest blog posts.
How Superhuman + HeyGen: Turn Any Content into a Video
There's a moment most marketers know well. You're writing an email for a campaign. You know your audience, you know what you need to say, and somewhere in the back of your head, you are suppressing a realization: This would land so much better as a
Superhuman to Acquire GPTZero, AI Authenticity Platform
GPTZero will expand Superhuman’s authenticity layer, giving writers and readers confidence about the origin of what they’re submitting and reviewing

Superhuman, the productivity platform bringing AI to wherever people work, announced today that it has agreed to acquire GPTZero, a leading AI content detector with a comprehensive authenticity
Superhuman + GPTZero: Why We’re Betting on Authenticity in the Age of AI
According to a recent study from Graphite, half of the internet is now AI-generated. Text with minimal to no human oversight has a certain quality that is hard to name but easy to feel. The writing evokes a sense that nobody's home, often captured in the term
AI that works everywhere you work
Superhuman supports every aspect of your day and helps you move faster, think more deeply, and do the work only you can do.
Sign up

privacy policy

The Myth of a Superhuman AI
Superhuman is what Gmail would be if built today
Grammarly rebrands to 'Superhuman,' launches a new AI assistant

analysis.name: Superhuman
analysis.value_proposition: Mail, docs, and AI assistant that work across every app and tab to make knowledge workers faster and more responsive.
analysis.ideal_customer: high-performing teams (execs, sales, founders) drowning in email who want AI-native productivity across mail, docs, and every app

features.name: write with ai
features.description: AI drafting that composes emails in the user's voice

features.name: instant reply
features.description: One-shot AI-generated reply to a message

features.name: instant event
features.description: Create calendar events instantly from email context

features.name: auto archive
features.description: AI-driven automatic archiving of low-priority mail

features.name: auto reminders
features.description: AI surfaces follow-up reminders on unresponded threads

features.name: personalization
features.description: AI adapts to user's preferences and style

features.name: auto drafts
features.description: AI drafts replies automatically in your inbox

features.name: ask ai
features.description: Conversational AI Q&A over your mailbox

features.name: voice and tone match
features.description: AI matches the user's voice and tone in drafts

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: AI answers grounded in user-provided knowledge base

features.name: superhuman mail mcp
features.description: MCP server exposing Superhuman Mail to AI agents

features.name: block sender
features.description: Block a sender from reaching your inbox

features.name: read receipts
features.description: Read status tracking on sent email

features.name: quick quote
features.description: Quickly quote a portion of a prior message

features.name: undo send
features.description: Recall a message right after sending

features.name: offline support
features.description: Work in inbox without a connection

features.name: share availability
features.description: Insert bookable availability slots into emails

features.name: zoom integration
features.description: Add Zoom links to meetings from mail

features.name: google meet integration
features.description: Add Google Meet links to meetings from mail

features.name: microsoft teams integration
features.description: Add Microsoft Teams links to meetings

features.name: shared conversations
features.description: Share entire email threads with teammates

features.name: team comments
features.description: Comment on emails privately with the team

features.name: team snippets
features.description: Snippet library shared across a team

features.name: team read statuses
features.description: See when teammates read a message

features.name: team reply indicators
features.description: See when a teammate is replying to a thread

features.name: team knowledge base
features.description: Shared AI knowledge base across the team

features.name: centralized billing
features.description: Single billing entity for whole team

features.name: snippet manager
features.description: Admin management of team snippet library

features.name: google advanced protection
features.description: Support for Google's Advanced Protection Program

features.name: external recipient indicators
features.description: Warns when recipients are external to the org

features.name: phishing reporting
features.description: Report phishing directly from the inbox

features.name: superhuman go
features.description: Proactive AI assistant that works in every app you use
features.evidence_quote: Go is the proactive AI assistant that knows what you know

features.name: grammarly writing assistant
features.description: AI writing partner across every app you write in

features.name: coda workspace
features.description: All-in-one AI workspace for wikis, project plans, trackers
features.evidence_quote: The all-in-one AI workspace for teams

features.name: agent store
features.description: Marketplace of AI agents built on the Superhuman Platform

features.name: gptzero authenticity detection
features.description: AI content detection via acquired GPTZero
features.evidence_quote: Superhuman to Acquire GPTZero, AI Authenticity Platform

features.name: heygen video generation
features.description: Turn content into video via HeyGen integration
features.evidence_quote: How Superhuman + HeyGen: Turn Any Content into a Video

differentiators: AI that works everywhere you work — across every app and tab, not just email
Suite bundling Mail + Grammarly + Coda + Go under one Superhuman brand
Proactive AI assistant (Go) that acts without being asked
Voice-and-tone-matching AI drafting grounded in a team knowledge base
Speed-first, keyboard-driven inbox that promises 4 hours saved per week
MCP server exposing mail to external AI agents

recent_ships.what: Superhuman + HeyGen integration turning content into video
recent_ships.source: How Superhuman + HeyGen: Turn Any Content into a Video

recent_ships.what: Announced agreement to acquire GPTZero as authenticity layer
recent_ships.source: Superhuman to Acquire GPTZero, AI Authenticity Platform

recent_ships.what: Rebrand of Grammarly to 'Superhuman' with new AI assistant
recent_ships.source: Grammarly rebrands to 'Superhuman,' launches a new AI assistant

praised: 'the speed, thoughtfulness, and quality … make it a no-brainer for any high-performing team' (Jen Igartua, Go Nimbly)
'Superhuman is what Gmail would be if built today' (HN)
'immediately changed my habits: increasing my responsiveness, while decreasing the time I spend'
complaints: 'Superhuman embeds tracking pixels in user emails' — long-standing privacy criticism (HN, 467 upvotes)
Skepticism about AI marketing claims: 'The Myth of a Superhuman AI' (HN)
Confusion / brand dilution around Grammarly → Superhuman rebrand and acquisition (HN)

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Email productivity, Superhuman AI, team collab, calendar, unified admin, group coaching

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starter plus advanced AI, Auto Drafts, Ask AI, Mail MCP, custom AI labels, HubSpot/Salesforce, Recent Opens

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Business plus SSO, SCIM, advanced security/controls, CSM, team analytics, priority support, VIP coaching

pricing.notes: Seat-based pricing on all tiers; monthly prices shown are annual-billed equivalents (Starter $300/yr, Business $396/yr); no free tier — trial only via signup flow
